description: A city planner wants to understand where shared e-scooters are most frequently used to plan for new bike lanes.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all e-scooter trip data (start and end points) for the last 3 months.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully queries the micromobility database.

nodes.task_description: Generate a heatmap visualization of the most popular trip routes.

expected_outcome.value: The system generates a map showing the most heavily trafficked corridors.

nodes.task_description: Export the heatmap and underlying data for the transportation planning department.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a report for the planners.
